---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div class="hero">

<div class="hero-inner">

![](fig/me34.jpg){.photo-oval}

<div class="hero-text">

### Hello, My name is

# Ricardo Tomaz

## PhD Student in Plant Pathology


<div class="btn social-links">
  <a href="https://github.com/tomazrg" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ricardo-gomes-tom%C3%A1z-0137ba189/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.instagram.com/tomaz.ricardogomes/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-instagram"></i>
  </a>
</div>



</div>

</div>

</div>
